title: Video by between_the_posts_com
description:
With this @blazepod drill you do not only work out, you also find out pretty fast what muscles you have to work on. Besides the pretty obvious hand-eye coordination and rebound control part, you also deliver extra weight to your core and legs. Wherever you feel sore first, is where you maybe should focus on in your next workouts.
-
Goalie: @simon.bitterli91
-
